user.title: Home Assistant Dashboard Studio
user.description: Registers dashboard studio panels in the sidebar. Each saved dashboard gets its own entry — no configuration.yaml entry required.

abort.already_configured: Home Assistant Dashboard Studio is already configured.

init.title: Dashboard Studio
init.description: Debug logging for dashboard authors or a full factory reset.

debug.title: Debug logs
debug.description:
Allows `db.log` / `db.warn` from dashboard code in the browser console. Each author can also use the 🐞 toggle in the editor.

Without this option the console stays quiet in production (even if `db.*` is in the code).

reset.title: Reset integration (factory defaults)
reset.description:
Resets **everything** as if the integration were freshly installed:

- All saved dashboards and code (global, all users)
- Extra sidebar entries
- Browser data for this integration (e.g. `usePersistentState`)

You keep **one** default dashboard with the bundled example. The integration itself stays configured.

**Note:** Unsaved editor changes are lost. Open dashboard tabs reload automatically afterwards.

data.confirm_reset: Yes, delete everything and restore factory defaults
